title: NONOS capsule manifest
description: Canonical schema for the kernel-facing capsule manifest. The kernel decoder in src/security/capsule_manifest is the source of truth for v2; this document mirrors its wire layout. The kernel verifies the manifest signature against a publisher pubkey already chained to NONOS_PUBLISHER_ROOT_PUBKEY through a publisher certificate (see abi/publisher_cert.schema.json). Marketplace metadata that does not affect kernel admission lives in a userland-extended envelope outside this schema.

publisher_pubkey.description: Hex-encoded Ed25519 publisher public key. Must match the publisher_pubkey in the accompanying publisher certificate.

app_namespace.description: Reverse-domain namespace. Participates in capsule_id derivation.

target_triple.description: Target triple of the artifact ELF, e.g. x86_64-nonos-user. The kernel refuses a manifest whose target_triple does not match the running kernel's expected user target.

payload_hash.description: BLAKE3 over the full ELF bytes the kernel will load.

required_caps.description: Hex-encoded u64 mask of capabilities the capsule needs to function.

optional_caps.description: Hex-encoded u64 mask of additional caps the capsule may use if granted.

signature.description: Hex-encoded Ed25519 signature by publisher_pubkey over the wire bytes preceding the signature.
